name: IELTS Speaking Coach
tagline: Full-featured IELTS speaking coach with audio pronunciation scoring, mock exams, and ZPD learning paths
description: An OpenClaw skill that acts as an IELTS Speaking Examiner and Tutor. Evaluates spoken English on Fluency & Coherence, Lexical Resource, Grammar, and Pronunciation (Band 1-9) using official descriptors. Supports audio input for real pronunciation scoring via ffmpeg + ASR. Features include: Part 1/2/3 practice, full mock exam simulation, ZPD-based personalized learning paths, adaptive difficulty, grammar corrections, vocabulary upgrades, pronunciation guidance for Chinese speakers, 42 difficulty-tagged cue cards, and spoken-register model answers.
